story_shape: the engine of a national-title defense -- an underrated blitzing linebacker who started every game of the run

plan.spine: the high-motor linebacker who started all 16 games of Indiana's title run returns rather than chase an early jump
blend: 2025: 103 tackles, 10.5 TFL, 8.5 sacks; started all 16 on a title-game run
5-11, 229 -- rare blitz production for an off-ball linebacker
top-5 nationally at the position in TFL
plan.payoff: 103 tackles and 8.5 sacks on the deepest run in school history
plan.forward_stake: whether the underrated engine becomes a recognized All-American

hook: Rolijah Hardy started every game of Indiana's run to the national championship game and racked up 8.5 sacks from off the ball -- rare for a linebacker. He came back instead of chasing an early jump. The engine is back.
expand: Hardy was the motor of Indiana's title-game defense: 103 tackles, 10.5 tackles for loss, and 8.5 sacks while starting all 16 games of the deepest run in school history, earning second-team All-Big Ten. The 8.5 sacks are the eye-opener -- that kind of blitz production from an off-ball linebacker is rare, and it ranked him top-five nationally at the position in tackles for loss. At 5-11, 229 he plays bigger than his frame. The forward stakes are recognition catching up to production: he's been the underrated engine of an elite defense, and 2026 is the year a player this disruptive turns "underrated" into All-America. He came back to finish what Indiana started.
style: Hardy is a high-motor, blitzing linebacker whose calling card is backfield production from an off-ball spot. The 8.5 sacks and 10.5 tackles for loss are the tell: he times pressures, beats blockers in the hole, and finishes -- the kind of disruption usually reserved for edge players. At 5-11, 229 he's not the biggest, but he plays downhill with real pop and covers ground. He's an every-down engine -- a tackle-machine in the run game (103 stops) and a pressure threat on passing downs -- the connective tissue of a defense that played in the national championship game. The production has been elite; 2026 is about the name catching up to it.
style_layers_pending: no offensive PBP for a linebacker -- box (tackles/TFL/sacks) + All-Big Ten + attributed scouting grounded; fan-vs-rival discourse descriptors pending discourse-extraction cleanup
